mission.title: spire: Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2
mission.description: Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2. Requested by 3+ users.

steps.title: Check current spire deployment
steps.description:
Verify your spire version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire
helm list -n spire 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working spire installation.

steps.title: Review spire configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant spire configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire
kubectl get configmap -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=spire
```
* **Version**: 1.5.5+
* **Platform**: K8S with amd64 linux kernel using cgroups v2
* **Subsystem**: Agent k8s workload attestor

Currently k8s workload attestor is extracting podUID and containerUID from

steps.title: Apply the fix for Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2
steps.description:
Add support for matching cgroups v2 with systemd driver to docker workloadattestor.

Apply the `dockerCGroupsRE` to candidate path elements extracted by the `<id>` matcher in the DSL. Related to #4004.
```yaml
hostPID: true
hostNetwork: true
dnsPolicy: ClusterFirstWithHostNet
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n spire -l app.kubernetes.io/name=spire
kubectl get events -n spire --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Agent K8S workload attestor support for cgroups v2" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Add support for matching cgroups v2 with systemd driver to docker workloadattestor.

Apply the `dockerCGroupsRE` to candidate path elements extracted by the `<id>` matcher in the DSL. Related to #4004.
codeSnippets:
hostPID: true
hostNetwork: true
dnsPolicy: ClusterFirstWithHostNet

k exec -it ds/spire-agent -c spire-agent -- /bin/sh
/opt/spire # cat /proc/302967/cgroup
0::/
/opt/spire # cat /proc/329596/cgroup
0::/../../kubepods-besteffort-podb2dce23b_8b3a_4356_b903_56152d488916.slice/cri-containerd-cf6d9de603ab1f665fc84f88c22f761678fcaae86b98a3936e0b9717740146aa.scope

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with spire installed or the issue environment reproducible.
